Name: Materion Corporation
Description: Materion Corporation (MTRN) is a premier provider of advanced materials solutions, delivering specialized products essential for diverse sectors including aerospace, defense, telecommunications, and electronics. The company is recognized for its high-performance metals and alloys, particularly beryllium and copper, along with specialty coatings that comply with rigorous industry standards. By emphasizing research and development and fostering strategic partnerships, Materion enhances its competitive edge while pursuing sustainable growth through innovative technologies and a comprehensive, customer-focused product portfolio.
Address: 6070 PARKLAND BOULEVARD, MAYFIELD HEIGHTS, OH, UNITED STATES, 44124
